creator: naito.yuichiro@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 194973
itamae.patch

Attached `itamae.patch` adds a new feature that supports FreeBSD jail.
I've been making a pull request to upstream, but didn't get any response yet.

My patch works on my host, and I need this feature for my jails.
Please apply to Ports tree.

After my patch is merged to upstream, I will delete my patches from Ports tree.
